title: Amtech L3350 33 Piece Security Power bit Set
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE: This power bit set is manufactured from chrome vanadium steel
VERSATILE: It includes a selection of tamper proof Torx, hex, tri-wing, quad wing and spanner bits, plus 60mm magnetic bit, all supplied in a handy storage case
PLEASE NOTE: These bits are not suitable for use with impact drivers or wrenches
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No

specifications_table.Style: ‎Torx, Hex, Tri-wing, Quad wing and spanner bits
specifications_table.Compatible fastener range: ‎This 33-piece power bit set is designed for use with fasteners that have Torx, Hex, Tri-Wing, Quad wing and spanner drive types.
